title.en: Ye Tian's Supreme Domain Body ushered in a qual...

content.en:
Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's Supreme Domain Body ushered in a qualitative change under the tempering of a large number of primordial ancestral springs.

The pinnacle of the Supreme Domain Body was originally the ultimate of the Domain Body, and the Ancestor Body was no longer a Domain Body.

Originally, no treasure could refine the domain body of the unsurpassed peak, but with the help of the primordial ancestral spring, Ye Tiancai could break the peak of the unsurpassed domain body.

Click!!!

Ye Tian's Peerless Domain Body shattered into countless fragments, but it quickly recovered again.

At this time, he had already broken the shackles and began to frantically absorb the energy here to promote the breakthrough of the Peerless Domain.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian's second transformation of the Upper Grade Domain Body was completely completed.

"Ten times!"

Ye Tian felt the brand-new Peerless Domain Body, which was ten times more powerful than before.

The Higher-Level Domain Body is ten times stronger, and the overall combat power is indeed less than ten times, but it has also increased several times!

When he reached the peak realm of the Peerless Domain Ancestor, it would have taken endless years to make every progress, and there was not even any progress at all.

But now, in a short period of time, the strength has increased several times, which is already very terrifying.

After Ye Tian broke through, he took a look at his family again.

The sons and daughters have also improved their cultivation very quickly, and they have already reached the late stage of the Peerless Domain Ancestor, and the speed at which they swallow the energy of the spring water is even faster than that of the ordinary Peerless Domain Ancestor, after all, Ye Tian has also given them a lot of holy endowments, and even given them ancestral endowments.

Therefore, there was no way for other higher-level domain ancestors to compare.

It can be said that before the Primordial Ancestral Spring is completely scrapped, they can definitely break through to the peak realm of the Peerless Domain Ancestor.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands of years have passed.

this day.

The original ancestral spring has been completely scrapped, and the spring water inside has been exhausted.

Boom Boom Boom !!

A powerful Peerless Peak Domain Ancestor and Supreme Soul Ancestor showed their aura, such as several Peerless Peak Domain Ancestors of the Battle Gate, who also completed the second transformation at this time, and their strength rose sharply one by one, but compared to Ye Tian, they were still ants.

And the other Peerless Domain Ancestors have almost all been promoted to the late stage realm of the Peerless Domain Ancestor and the Peerless Peak Realm.

The same is true on the Terran side, and the Peerless Soul Ancestors have all been promoted to the late stage realm of the Peerless Soul Ancestors.

It's a pity that the energy of the Primordial Ancestral Spring is limited, and with a big energy-swallowing person like Ye Tian, there is no way to make all the Peerless Soul Ancestors and Peerless Domain Ancestors break through to the peak realm of the Peerless Domain Ancestor and the Peak of the Peerless Soul Ancestor.

However, they were also very satisfied.

Because after the tempering of the Primordial Ancestral Spring, their cultivation in the future will be much easier, and they will all have full confidence in breaking through to the peak of the Peerless Domain Ancestor and the peak realm of the Peerless Soul Ancestor in the future.

In the days that followed.

Ye Tian moved a large number of cultivators from the Xuanxu Saint Realm to the Dark Soul Domain, and the Battle Gate naturally wouldn't stop it, and the other forces were in no mood to stop it now.

As a result, there are more and more Terrans in the Dark Souls Domain.

And with a large supply of resources, there are more and more invincible domain ancestors of the human race, but it is very difficult to give birth to a superior soul ancestor.

Because at this time, the benefits of the Dark Soul Domain were gone, and all cultivators cultivated just like the outside world.

For example, in the Dark Sanctuary, even if it is the heir of the Ancestor, it is very difficult to become a Superior Domain Ancestor.

The same is true of the Dark Soul Domain today, it is too difficult to give birth to a new Peerless Soul Ancestor.

Ye Tian didn't care about this, the human race was able to give birth to a large number of invincible soul ancestors, and that's fine.

There are many invincible soul ancestors, and there will always be a few who will be able to break through to the realm of peerless soul ancestors in the future.

And Ye Tian himself continued to retreat, constantly using the Replicating Body Evolution Ancestor Method.

He was ready to start creating his own Ancestor Method, and use his Ancestor Method to impact the Ancestor Realm.

And the ancestor clone is not without something to do, the clone also needs to cultivate to improve his strength, otherwise after a hundred realm years, the ancestors will come, and those ancestors will definitely not let him go.

Especially the Ancestor of Destruction, he definitely doesn't mind killing him, the Ancestor clone.

It's nothing if the ancestor clone falls, but without the protection of the ancestor clone, the human race will be in trouble, and even the main body can only hide in the battle gate.

After all, the human race has offended all the forces except the Battle Gate this time, and suddenly occupied the resources of the Dark Soul Domain, what a terrifying resource this is, the ancestors are all moved.

Of course.

In order to win over the ancestors of the Battle Gate, Ye Tian also gave up part of the resources of the Dark Soul Domain to the Battle Gate, so that the War Gate could give birth to a large number of invincible domain ancestors and some superior domain ancestors.

At least a hundred realm years later, the two ancestors of the Battle Gate were definitely helping him.

......

"It is very difficult for the Ancestors to improve their strength, although the Dark Soul Domain has also given birth to resources that are useful to the Ancestors, but the resources that really make the Ancestors fight are after a hundred realm years, and now it is unrealistic to rely on the resources of the Dark Soul Domain to quickly improve the strength of the Ancestors!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Therefore, he had to find a way to improve the strength of the Ancestor Clone.

He communicated with the two ancestors of the Battle Gate, and the main reason why the ancestor wanted to improve his strength was to increase the power of the ancestor, as well as to strengthen the body of the ancestor, as well as the soul of the ancestor.

This is similar to the domain ancestor, it is the improvement of cultivation.

The ancestor did not have any realm incarnation, only the division of combat power.

Ordinary Ancestor, Elite Ancestor, and Top Ancestor.

Most of the Ancestors were ordinary Ancestors, and even the Battle Ancestors were ordinary Ancestors, but the Realm Ancestors were powerful elite Ancestors, second only to the top Ancestors.

Upgrading cultivation needs to be done slowly, unless you get a treasure that greatly improves your cultivation, you can't quickly improve your cultivation.

There is another way to greatly increase the strength, and that is to master the Ultimate Ancestral Technique!

However, there are no more than five ancestors who have mastered the Ultimate Ancestor Technique, of course, this is information on the surface, in case which Ancestor hides his strength, then the other Ancestors have no way of knowing.

The Realm Ancestor has mastered an Ultimate Ancestral Technique, and the Saint Ancestor, the Destruction Ancestor, the Eternal Sect Master, and the Space-Time Ancestor, these five Ancestors have mastered an Ultimate Ancestral Technique.

It was precisely because of the Ultimate Ancestral Technique that they were so powerful.

If Ye Tian mastered an Ultimate Ancestor Technique, even if the Ancestor cultivation was lower, he would immediately have the combat power of a weaker Elite Ancestor.

When the time comes, if you improve the cultivation of the Ancestor a little, and then take charge of part of the power of the Dark Soul Domain, you will definitely be able to fight against the Ancestor of Destruction.
